headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Somany Ceramics Limited has received a corrigendum order from the NCLT Kolkata Bench, dated April 24, 2026, correcting typographical errors in its previous order regarding the amalgamation of Somany Bathware Limited, Somany Excel Vitrified Private Limited, and SR Continental Limited into Somany Ceramics. The correction replaces the term "Scheme of Arrangement" with "Scheme of Amalgamation" in several sections of the original order, while all other terms remain unchanged.

headline: Updates
summary: Kirloskar Electric Company Limited has received the certified order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Bengaluru Bench, approving the merger by absorption of its four wholly owned subsidiaries into the parent company. The order, dated April 30, 2026, sanctions the amalgamation of KELBUZZ Trading Private Limited, Luxquisite Parkland Private Limited, SLPKG Estate Holdings Private Limited, and SKG Terra Promenade Private Limited with Kirloskar Electric Company Limited. This approval follows the company's petition under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: Updates
summary: India Glycols Limited has updated that its scheme of arrangement, involving demerger into Ennature Biopharma Limited and IGL Spirits Limited, was listed before the NCLT on May 21, 2026, but could not be heard due to time constraints. The next hearing date has not yet been announced. Further updates will be provided as they become available.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Datamatics Global Services Limited's Board approved a Scheme of Amalgamation to merge its wholly owned subsidiaries, Dextara Digital Private Limited and Datamatics Cloud Solutions Private Limited, into the parent company. The Board also recommended a final dividend of Rs. 5 per share for FY 2025-26 and approved the re-appointment of Rahul L. Kanodia as Vice Chairman & CEO for five years starting February 2027. These proposals are subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

headline: Allotment of Securities
summary: Hindustan Foods Limited has allotted 4,81,39,085 equity shares to shareholders of Avalon Cosmetics and Vanity Case India as part of a sanctioned Scheme of Arrangement. Fractional entitlements were consolidated and issued to a trust for sale and distribution of proceeds. Additionally, 4,64,58,145 shares held by the Transferor Company in Hindustan Foods were cancelled.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has convened a meeting of its secured creditors on June 24, 2026, via video conferencing, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench, to vote on a Scheme of Arrangement under the Companies Act. Remote e-voting will be available from June 20 to June 23, 2026, with e-voting also provided during the meeting. Creditors listed as of December 31, 2025, are eligible to vote, and the meeting notice and related documents are available on the company's website and stock exchange platforms.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals has announced a Scheme of Arrangement under the Companies Act, convening a meeting of its unsecured creditors on June 24, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal. Creditors as of December 31, 2025, are eligible to vote on the resolutions via remote e-voting from June 20 to June 23, 2026, or during the meeting. The notice and related documents are available on the company’s website and stock exchange platforms.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has issued a notice for a Scheme of Arrangement under the Companies Act, convening a shareholder meeting via video conferencing. Equity shareholders as of the June 17, 2026 cut-off date are eligible to vote, with remote e-voting open from June 20 to June 23, 2026. The notice and related documents are available on the company's website and stock exchange platforms.

headline: Press Release
summary: Dalmia Bharat Limited announced the execution of a Business Transfer Agreement to acquire a 5.2 million tonnes per annum cement capacity in the Central Region from Jaiprakash Associates Ltd, which was acquired by the Adani Group. The disclosure was made via a press release dated May 22, 2026.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: BASF India Limited has convened a meeting of its equity shareholders on June 24, 2026, via video conferencing, to seek approval for a proposed Scheme of Arrangement to demerge its Agricultural Solutions Business into BASF Agricultural Solutions India Limited. The meeting follows directions from the National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench, and eligible shareholders can vote remotely from June 19 to June 23, 2026. The official notice and related documents have been sent to shareholders and are available on the company’s website.

headline: Sale or disposal
summary: One Mobikwik Systems Limited's board has approved the sale of its Lending Services Provider (LSP) business on a slump sale basis to its wholly owned subsidiary, MobiKwik Distribution Services Private Limited. The LSP business contributed 22.70% of the company's revenue and 16.94% of its net worth in the last financial year. The transaction is subject to shareholder approval and the execution of a business transfer agreement.

headline: General Updates
summary: GOCL Corporation Limited has received a "No Objection" letter from the National Stock Exchange of India regarding its proposed scheme to merge Hinduja National Power Corporation Limited into GOCL. The NSE has outlined several compliance conditions, including disclosure of ongoing legal proceedings and financial details, which the company must follow. The scheme remains subject to approval from the NCLT, shareholders, and other regulatory authorities.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Gabriel India Limited announced that the certified copy of the court order and the Scheme of Arrangement was filed with the Registrar of Companies on May 22, 2026, making the Scheme effective from that date. As a result, the Transferor Company has been amalgamated and dissolved, and the Demerged Undertaking has been transferred to Gabriel India on a going concern basis.

headline: General Updates
summary: RHI Magnesita India Limited has announced a scheme of merger involving its wholly owned subsidiary, Intermetal Engineers (India) Private Limited, merging into Ashwath Technologies Private Limited, which is a wholly owned subsidiary of Intermetal Engineers. The merger is between two wholly owned subsidiaries of the company.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: The Board of Maharashtra Seamless Limited has approved a scheme to demerge two of its business units into separate wholly owned subsidiaries, MSL Seamless Tubes Limited and United Seamless Limited, effective October 1, 2026. The demerger will transfer its Mangaon plant and Beed solar facility to MSTL, and its Narketpally plant, Rajasthan solar plants, and rig Jindal Explorer to USL. The scheme is subject to approval from the NCLT, shareholders, and creditors.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, has approved the first motion application for Gloster Limited's merger scheme, dispensing with the requirement for shareholder meetings. The scheme involves the amalgamation of two wholly-owned subsidiaries, Gloster Lifestyle Limited and Gloster Specialities Limited, into Gloster Limited. This merger aims to improve capital and asset efficiency, strengthen future growth, and enhance shareholder value, with no shares to be issued as consideration since the subsidiaries are wholly owned.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: The Board of Kolte-Patil Developers Limited has approved a scheme to amalgamate its two wholly-owned subsidiaries, Kolte-Patil Lifespaces Private Limited and Kolte-Patil Smart Spaces Private Limited, into itself. The merger is subject to necessary statutory, regulatory, and shareholder approvals, as well as creditor consent.

headline: General Updates
summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited announced that its indirect wholly owned subsidiary, SMR Automotive Operations Japan K.K., has merged into its holding company, Misato Industries Co. Ltd., following registration with the Commercial Registry of Japan. The merger, effective from April 1, 2026, aims to simplify the corporate structure and increase operating efficiency, with all assets transferred by universal succession. Misato ceased to exist after the merger, and the company provided the required regulatory disclosure under SEBI listing regulations.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: BASF India Limited has issued a newspaper publication regarding a notice for a meeting of its equity shareholders, convened by the NCLT. The meeting is scheduled for June 24, 2026, at 3:30 PM IST and will be held via audio-visual means.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has announced that notices for NCLT-convened meetings of its secured creditors, unsecured creditors, and equity shareholders, scheduled for June 24, 2026, were published in newspapers on May 23, 2026. These meetings are part of a composite scheme of arrangement involving Apollo Hospitals and related entities. The company provided copies of the newspaper publications for reference.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: AYM Syntex Limited held a meeting of its Unsecured Creditors on May 25, 2026, via video conferencing, as ordered by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The meeting was convened to discuss and vote on a Scheme of Amalgamation under the Companies Act, 2013. The company has now disclosed the proceedings of this meeting in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: AYM Syntex Limited held a meeting of its Unsecured Creditors on May 25, 2026, via video conferencing, as ordered by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The meeting was chaired by Ms. Mala Todarwal and addressed a proposed Scheme of Amalgamation under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act. The company has filed the meeting proceedings with the stock exchange and made them available on its website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: AYM Syntex Limited held a meeting of its equity shareholders on May 25, 2026, via video conferencing, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The meeting was convened to consider and vote on a Scheme of Amalgamation under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The company has disclosed the proceedings of this meeting in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: AYM Syntex Limited held a meeting of its equity shareholders on May 25, 2026, via video conferencing, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal. The meeting was convened to consider a Scheme of Amalgamation under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The company has filed the meeting proceedings with the stock exchange and made them available on its website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Siemens Limited's Board has approved a scheme to amalgamate its wholly-owned subsidiary, Siemens Rail Automation Private Limited (SRAPL), into itself. The merger is subject to regulatory and statutory approvals, including from the National Company Law Tribunal. As SRAPL is a wholly-owned subsidiary, no consideration will be issued under the scheme.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: AYM Syntex Limited announced the approval of a special resolution for the amalgamation of Mandawewala Enterprises Limited into AYM Syntex, as confirmed by voting results from a May 25, 2026 meeting of unsecured creditors. The resolution received 100% votes in favor from public non-institutional shareholders, with no votes against, and the scrutinizer's report has been filed as required under SEBI regulations.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: AYM Syntex Limited announced the voting results from a shareholder meeting held on May 25, 2026, regarding a special resolution to approve the Scheme of Amalgamation of Mandawewala Enterprises Limited with the company. The resolution was passed unanimously, with 100% of the votes cast (526,235,489 votes) in favor and none against, all from public non-institutional shareholders. The detailed voting results and the Scrutinizer's report are available on the company's website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: AYM Syntex Limited announced the voting results for the special resolution approving the Scheme of Amalgamation of Mandawewala Enterprises Limited with the company. The resolution was passed with 100% of votes cast in favor, with 40,799,172 votes (99.9995% of total polled) supporting the merger and only 10 votes against. The results, along with the Scrutinizer's Report, have been made available on the company's website.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: AYM Syntex Limited announced the voting results from its May 25, 2026, shareholder meeting, which was convened per the National Company Law Tribunal's directions. The special resolution to approve the amalgamation of Mandawewala Enterprises Limited with AYM Syntex was passed unanimously, with 100% of votes cast in favor and no votes against. The detailed voting results and the Scrutinizer's Report are available on the company's website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Landmark Cars Limited has announced the approval of a scheme to amalgamate its wholly owned subsidiary, Landmark Cars (East) Private Limited, into itself. The merger, involving shareholders and creditors, has been filed under Sections 230 and 233 of the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Piramal Finance Limited has received an NCLAT order allowing it to skip convening an equity shareholders' meeting for its proposed amalgamation with Piramal Corporate Tower Private Limited, Piramal Agastya Offices Private Limited, and DHFL Investments Limited. The order grants dispensation from this procedural requirement for the merger scheme.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Based on the announcement, Cello World Limited confirmed that it has no outstanding qualified borrowings for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, making the related SEBI disclosure requirements inapplicable. The company also reported no deviation in the utilization of the ₹738 Crores raised via a Qualified Institutional Placement in July 2024, with funds used as originally intended for subsidiary investments, debt repayment, and working capital.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Ruchi Infrastructure Limited's Board has approved a composite scheme to amalgamate Lennox Investment Pvt. Ltd. and Multiacre Investment Services Pvt. Ltd. into the company. The two investment companies being merged have no turnover and combined paid-up capital of ₹7.74 crore, while Ruchi Infrastructure has a turnover of ₹61.18 crore. The company will now seek necessary approvals from stock exchanges and regulatory authorities to proceed with the merger.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: Elgi Rubber Company Limited's Board approved reversing Rs. 16.43 million in interest receivable from its overseas subsidiaries for the March 2026 quarter. The Board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and reappointed the company's cost auditor, internal auditors, and Chairman & Managing Director.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Tilaknagar Industries Limited's Board has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation to merge its two wholly owned subsidiaries, Punjabexpo Breweries Private Limited and Vahni Distilleries Private Limited, into the parent company. The merger is subject to obtaining necessary approvals and consents as per the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited has announced that its Board approved a Postal Ballot Notice on April 10, 2026, seeking shareholder approval for resolutions via remote e-voting. The cut-off date for eligibility is May 22, 2026, with e-voting open from June 3 to July 2, 2026, and results to be declared by July 4, 2026. The notice and related documents are available on the company’s website and NSDL’s e-voting platform.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: Rama Steel Tubes Limited announced that its Board approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified audit opinion. The Board also approved the appointment of Mr. Sumit Sharma as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27, the strike-off of its inactive wholly owned subsidiary Rama Defence Private Limited, and a change in the company’s registered and corporate office addresses.

headline: Change in Management
summary: Bajaj Auto Limited announced that Ms. Baminee Viswanat (now Chief Legal Officer) and Mr. Vijay Jerome (Chief Digital & Information Officer) will no longer be part of senior management due to an organisational restructuring. The change, effective from 1 June 2026, follows a shift in their reporting structure as defined under Listing Regulations.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited has announced that, per the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated May 5, 2026, a meeting of its Unsecured Creditors will be held on July 2, 2026, in Chennai to consider an amalgamation/merger. Remote e-voting for the resolution will be open from June 7 to July 1, 2026, with the cut-off date for eligibility set as December 31, 2025. The company has also provided the meeting notice and explanatory statement on its website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited has announced that, per the NCLT's May 5, 2026 order, a meeting of its Secured Creditors will be held on July 2, 2026, in Chennai to vote on an amalgamation/merger scheme. Remote e-voting will be open from June 7 to July 1, 2026, with only creditors registered as of December 31, 2025, eligible to vote. The company has engaged NSDL to facilitate the e-voting process.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited has announced that a meeting of equity shareholders, convened by order of the NCLT, will be held on July 2, 2026, at The Music Academy in Chennai. The notice and explanatory statement for the meeting have been issued, with remote e-voting open from June 7 to July 1, 2026. Only shareholders on the register as of the June 3, 2026 cut-off date are eligible to vote.

headline: Updates
summary: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, H.G. Varanasi-Kolkata PKG-10 Highway Private Limited, received the appointed date of May 30, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India for a highway project. The project involves constructing a 35.6 km, six-lane greenfield highway in Jharkhand under the Bharatmala Pariyojana, with a total project cost of ₹1,303.11 crore and a completion period of 730 days.

headline: General Updates
summary: The Ramco Cements Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench, has approved the first motion application filed by Ramco Windfarms Limited on May 27, 2026. The tribunal has directed the company to file the second motion application within 14 days of receiving the order.

company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
headline: Updates
summary: The Investment Trust of India Limited (TITL) has obtained all necessary regulatory approvals to transfer its fund management and advisory business for the ITI Long Short Fund and ITI Long Short Equity Offshore Fund to its wholly-owned subsidiary, ITI Asset Management Limited. This transfer, part of a broader group reorganization, consolidates asset management activities while TITL will continue as the sponsor of the funds. The announcement updates previous disclosures made in February and May 2025.

headline: General Updates
summary: Strides Pharma Science Limited received the certified NCLT order approving its Scheme of Demerger on May 25, 2026. Following the filing of the order with the Registrar of Companies by Arco Lab and Pivot Path, the demerger became effective on June 1, 2026.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited has published a Postal Ballot Notice and e-voting details in the Business Standard and Mumbai Lakshdeep newspapers on June 1, 2026. This disclosure is made in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company has requested that the information be taken on record.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited has informed the stock exchange about a newspaper publication regarding the NCLT-convened meetings. The joint advertisement covers meetings for the company's equity shareholders, secured creditors, and unsecured creditors.

headline: General Updates
summary: United Foodbrands Limited has provided an update to the Exchange regarding the Scheme of Amalgamation involving its subsidiaries, Blue Planet Foods Private Limited and Red Apple Kitchen Consultancy Private Limited. The announcement pertains to the ongoing merger process between these two subsidiary entities.

headline: General Updates
summary: CMM Infraprojects Limited has informed the stock exchange of an update regarding an Interim Application filed with the Hon'ble NCLT, Indore Bench. The announcement pertains to general updates in the ongoing legal proceedings. No further details on the nature or outcome of the application were provided.

headline: General Updates
summary: Kalpataru Limited has withdrawn the proposed Scheme of Arrangement to demerge its wholly owned subsidiary, Kalpataru Properties Limited, into the parent company. The decision effectively cancels the previously announced restructuring plan involving the transfer of the demerged undertaking.

headline: General Updates
summary: Thermax Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench, has approved the scheme to merge Buildtech Products India Private Limited into Thermax through absorption. The order was communicated to the stock exchange as a general update.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy Limited has received an order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, to convene meetings of its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors. The order pertains to a scheme or resolution requiring their approval. This update was formally communicated to the stock exchange.

headline: Agreements
summary: HFCL Limited's board approved a ₹89.25 crore investment in its wholly-owned subsidiary HFCL Advance Systems Private Limited (HASPL) via a share subscription agreement, alongside executing a shareholders' agreement to govern HASPL's management. The board also approved the sale of up to 80% of Raddef Private Limited to HASPL for ₹75 crore, the transfer of HFCL's thermal weapon sight business to HASPL for ₹50 crore on a slump sale basis, and HASPL's acquisition of 100% of HFCL Defence Systems Private Limited for ₹25 crore.

headline: Allotment of Securities
summary: Coforge Limited has allotted 1,26,71,602 equity shares to eligible shareholders of Cigniti Technologies Limited as part of their amalgamation scheme, using a 1:1 share exchange ratio. This allotment increases Coforge’s total paid-up share capital to over 44.26 crore shares, amounting to ₹88.53 crore. The company is now completing formalities to list these new shares on stock exchanges.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: ACC Limited has received observation letters with "no adverse observations" from BSE and a "No Objection" from NSE regarding its proposed merger with Ambuja Cements Limited. This regulatory clearance marks a key step forward in the amalgamation process.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Orient Cement Limited has received observation letters with "no adverse objection" from BSE and "no objection" from NSE regarding its merger with Ambuja Cements Limited. The approvals pertain to the Scheme of Amalgamation where Orient Cement is the transferor company and Ambuja Cements is the transferee company. This marks a key regulatory step toward completing the amalgamation.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Ambuja Cements Limited has received "no adverse objection" from BSE and "no objection" from NSE regarding the proposed merger of Orient Cement Limited into Ambuja Cements. This clears a key regulatory step for the amalgamation scheme.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Ambuja Cements Limited has received observation letters with "no adverse observations" from BSE and a "no objection" from NSE regarding its merger scheme with ACC Limited. The scheme involves the amalgamation of ACC Limited into Ambuja Cements Limited. This marks a key regulatory step toward the consolidation of the two companies.

headline: General Updates
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Ltd. has provided a material update regarding its Composite Scheme of Arrangement involving itself, Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd., and Triveni Power Transmission Ltd. The update pertains to the scheme filed under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013. No further details on the specific update were disclosed in the announcement.

headline: Suspension of Trading
summary: Trading in equity shares of Sanco Industries Limited will be suspended from the close of trading on June 4, 2026, due to a Scheme of Amalgamation. The suspension takes effect from June 5, 2026.

headline: Updates
summary: Radico Khaitan Limited announced that the NCLT, Allahabad Bench, has dispensed with the meetings of equity shareholders of the transferor companies, as well as the meetings of equity shareholders and creditors of the transferee company, as part of a corporate restructuring process. This order was issued on June 1, 2026, and uploaded on June 5, 2026.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Hubtown Limited held a shareholders' meeting on June 5, 2026, as directed by the NCLT Mumbai Bench. The meeting addressed the proposed merger of Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited into Hubtown Limited under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The company has submitted a summary of the meeting's proceedings to the Exchange.

headline: Updates
summary: Orchid Pharma Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai, has approved its merger scheme with Dhanuka Laboratories Limited on June 5, 2026. The sanctioned scheme allows for the transfer and vesting of Dhanuka Laboratories into Orchid Pharma on a going concern basis. This approval follows the company's earlier intimation regarding the merger petition.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Andhra Cements Limited announced that its Board of Directors approved a Scheme of Amalgamation for the merger of the company with its holding company, Sagar Cements Limited. The scheme is subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, stock exchanges, SEBI, and the National Company Law Tribunal. The Board also noted the valuation report and fairness opinion recommending the share swap ratio for the proposed merger.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Happiest Minds Technologies Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Bengaluru Bench, has approved its Scheme of Arrangement on May 29, 2026, with an appointed date of April 1, 2026. The company received the certified copy of the order on June 5, 2026.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Hubtown Limited held a meeting of its unsecured creditors on June 5, 2026, as directed by the NCLT Mumbai Bench. The meeting discussed a proposed Scheme of Arrangement for the merger of Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited into Hubtown Limited. The proceedings were conducted under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: NIIT Learning Systems Limited announced that its subsidiary, NIIT (Ireland) Limited, approved a capital restructuring of its step-down subsidiary, NIIT Learning Solutions (Canada) Ltd. The restructuring reduces the par value of NIIT Canada’s common shares by CAD 5,058,493 to return excess cash to NIIT Ireland, as the company’s operations have scaled down after completing a large contract. The move has no material financial impact and does not change the ownership structure.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Meghmani Organics Limited held a meeting of its unsecured creditors on June 3-5, 2026, to consider and approve a Scheme of Amalgamation involving Kilburn Chemicals Limited and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited. Remote e-voting was conducted during this period, with results to be shared on stock exchanges and the company’s website. The meeting concluded after the business was transacted, as directed by the NCLT Ahmedabad.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Meghmani Organics Limited held a meeting of its secured creditors on June 6, 2026, via video conferencing, as convened by the Hon'ble NCLT. The announcement summarizes the proceedings of this court-ordered meeting. No specific outcomes or resolutions were detailed in the provided summary.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Meghmani Organics Limited held a shareholders' meeting on June 6, 2026, via video conferencing to consider and approve a Scheme of Amalgamation involving Kilburn Chemicals Limited and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited. The meeting, chaired by an NCLT-appointed advocate, concluded at 2:21 PM with the requisite quorum present. The scheme aims to create a more integrated, efficient, and scalable business structure by combining the three entities.

headline: General Updates
summary: Archidply Decor Limited announced that its internal restructuring scheme became effective on June 5, 2026, transferring shares held by Ravi Marketing & Services Private Limited to Assam Timber Products Private Limited, and shares held by Vanraj Suppliers Private Limited to Shree Shyam Tea Private Limited. The transactions are an internal reorganization within the promoter group, resulting in no change to the aggregate promoter shareholding, management, or control of the company. Post-implementation, Assam Timber Products holds 32.51% and Shree Shyam Tea holds 18.96% of the company's shares.

headline: General Updates
summary: Archidply Industries Limited announced that its approved restructuring scheme became effective on June 5, 2026, resulting in the transfer of shares held by Ravi Marketing & Services Private Limited to Assam Timber Products Private Limited, and shares held by Vanraj Suppliers Private Limited to Shree Shyam Tea Private Limited. The internal reorganization within the promoter group does not change the aggregate promoter shareholding, management, or control of the company. Post-implementation, Assam Timber Products now holds 25.60% and Shree Shyam Tea holds 21.25% of the company's shares.

headline: General Updates
summary: Future Consumer Limited has issued a general update in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations. The announcement was signed by Managing Director Samson Samuel. No specific details regarding the nature of the update were provided.

headline: General Updates
summary: Future Consumer Limited has issued a general update in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations. The announcement was signed by Managing Director Samson Samuel. No specific details regarding the update were provided in the filing.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Persistent Systems Limited's Board has approved the merger of its wholly owned subsidiary, MediaAgility India Private Limited, into itself as part of an internal restructuring to achieve entity rationalization and operational efficiency. The merger is subject to necessary statutory approvals under the Companies Act, 2013. As MediaAgility is a wholly owned subsidiary, the transaction does not fall under related party provisions.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: Persistent Systems Limited has approved an internal restructuring to transfer its entire 100% shareholding in Persistent Systems UK Limited to its Irish subsidiary, Aepona Group Limited. The move aims to achieve entity rationalization and operational efficiency within the group, with no direct benefit to promoters or group companies. Following the transfer, Persistent Systems UK Limited will become a wholly owned subsidiary of Aepona Group Limited.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Amber Enterprises India Limited has received approval from the NCLT Chandigarh Bench for its Scheme of Arrangement, which includes dispensation of shareholder and creditor meetings. The Tribunal has allowed the First Motion Application, disposing of the matter accordingly.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has allotted 14,65,048 equity shares to eligible shareholders of SSEL as per the sanctioned Scheme of Arrangement, based on the June 3, 2026 record date. This allotment increases the company's paid-up equity capital to ₹22,03,63,016, and the new shares will rank equally with existing shares and be listed on BSE and NSE.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Dabur India Limited has informed the exchange of a scheduled hearing on August 3, 2026, regarding a Company Petition related to its proposed amalgamation with Sesa Care Private Limited. This hearing follows a directive from the National Company Law Tribunal issued on May 25, 2026. The scheme involves the amalgamation of Sesa Care into Dabur, affecting their respective shareholders and creditors.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Meghmani Organics Limited has submitted the Scrutinizer’s Report for the Unsecured Creditors meeting held on June 6, 2026, which was convened under NCLT directions regarding a Scheme of Amalgamation. The report, prepared by Advocate Pavni Lakhanpal, covers the remote e-voting and in-meeting voting processes. The document has been filed with the stock exchanges and is available on the company’s website.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Meghmani Organics Limited has submitted the Scrutinizer’s Report for the secured creditors' meeting held on June 6, 2026, regarding a proposed Scheme of Amalgamation involving Kilburn Chemicals and Meghmani Crop Nutrition. The meeting was conducted via video conferencing as directed by the NCLT, with remote and in-meeting e-voting scrutinized by an independent advocate. The report is now available on the company’s website and has been filed with the stock exchanges.

headline: General Updates
summary: Gabriel India Limited has issued a general update in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations. The announcement, signed by Company Secretary Nilesh Jain, is provided for information and record-keeping purposes. No specific operational or financial details were disclosed.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Astra Microwave Products Limited's Board has approved a Scheme of Arrangement for the company's demerger. The approval was disclosed in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations. The announcement outlines the board's decision regarding the corporate restructuring.

headline: Demerger
summary: Astra Microwave Products Limited's Board has approved a Scheme of Arrangement for a demerger. The move will restructure the company's operations, with the announcement made in compliance with SEBI listing regulations.

headline: General Updates
summary: Power Finance Corporation Limited (PFC) has received approval from the President of India for the proposed merger of REC Limited into PFC. This approval was conveyed by the Ministry of Power on June 10, 2026, following the Board's earlier decision to reserve the proposal for presidential consent. The update is provided in compliance with SEBI regulations.

headline: General Updates
summary: REC Limited announced that the Ministry of Power has conveyed the Competent Authority’s approval for the proposed merger of REC into PFC. This follows the earlier Board decision to reserve the proposal for the President of India’s approval. The update was made in compliance with SEBI listing regulations.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Health X Platform Limited’s board has approved a composite scheme of arrangement and amalgamation involving itself, Microsec Resources Private Limited, Innogrow Technologies Limited, and Sastasundar Healthbuddy Limited. Under the scheme, shareholders of Health X will receive one share in the resulting company for every three shares held, while specific share exchange ratios have been set for the transferor company. The scheme is subject to approvals from stock exchanges, SEBI, NCLT, RBI, and relevant shareholders and creditors.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Limited’s board has approved the merger of its subsidiary, Criss Financial Limited, into itself via absorption under a scheme of arrangement. The merger is subject to approvals from the Regional Director/NCLT, shareholders, creditors, and regulators including the RBI and SEBI. The share exchange ratio will be determined on an arm’s length basis based on an independent valuation and fairness opinion.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Maithan Alloys Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, has approved the merger of its wholly owned subsidiary, Impex Metal & Ferro Alloys Limited, into the company, with an appointed date of March 31, 2024. No shares will be issued under the scheme since the subsidiary is wholly owned, and there will be no change in the promoter's shareholding. The scheme will become effective once the certified NCLT order is filed with the Registrar of Companies.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Indo Thai Securities Limited has informed the stock exchange of a disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations regarding a Scheme of Arrangement. The announcement confirms the company's compliance with applicable listing obligations and disclosure requirements. Further details of the scheme were not provided in the headline.

headline: Delisting
summary: Jaiprakash Associates Limited’s equity shares will be delisted from the stock exchange effective June 18, 2026. This follows a resolution plan approved by the National Company Law Tribunal under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: Centum Electronics Limited has provided an update on the court-supervised restructuring proceedings (Redressement Judiciaire) for its French subsidiaries, Centum T&S Group S.A. and Centum T&S (Centum Technologies et Solutions). The announcement, filed under "Other Restructuring," confirms the ongoing legal process for these entities in France.

headline: Action(s) taken or orders passed
summary: Sonata Software Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench, has sanctioned the Scheme of Arrangement and Amalgamation between Encore I.T. Services Solutions Private Limited (Transferor Company) and Sonata Software Limited (Transferee Company) on June 5, 2026. The order was made available on the NCLT website on June 11, 2026, and the scheme will become effective once the certified copy is filed with the Registrar of Companies.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: In continuation of our earlier intimation dated March 02, 2026, we hereby inform you that the Scheme of Merger (“Scheme”) of Aurum Softwares and Solutions Private Limited (“Transferor Company”) with Liv Real Solutions Private Limited (“Transferee Company”), both wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company, under Section 233 of the Companies Act, 2013 read with the relevant rules made thereunder, has been approved by the Regional Director, Western Region II, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, vide order

headline: Updates
summary: Sammaan Capital announced that the NCLT has approved its first motion application regarding a proposed Scheme of Arrangement, dispensing with meetings of the demerged company’s shareholders and all creditors. The tribunal has directed a meeting of the resulting company’s equity shareholders to approve the scheme via video conferencing. The company will seek clarifications or modifications to the order from the NCLT.

headline: General Updates
summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has received a letter from West Central Railway declaring the appointed date of June 15, 2026, for a new railway line project between Bahari and Gondawali stations in Madhya Pradesh. The Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) project, valued at ₹1,897.51 crore (including GST), has a completion period of 900 days. The scope includes earthwork, bridges, viaducts, tunnels, station buildings, and track work as part of the Sidhi-Singrauli rail link.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Devyani International Limited has received "no objection" letters from NSE and BSE regarding its proposed Scheme of Arrangement with Sapphire Foods India Limited. The stock exchanges have outlined several compliance conditions, including obtaining CCI approval, disclosing ongoing legal proceedings, and ensuring shares are issued in demat form. The scheme remains subject to final statutory, regulatory, and shareholder approvals.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has issued additional information to shareholders and creditors regarding its proposed Scheme of Arrangement, which involves the separation and independent listing of Apollo Healthtech Limited. The document clarifies the governance framework for Apollo Healthtech, including board composition and nomination rights, the proposed appointment of Ms. Shobana Kamineni as Executive Chairperson, and the rationale behind the Upside Agreement. This information is intended to help stakeholders better understand the Scheme before voting on it in NCLT-convened meetings.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Supreme Infrastructure India Limited announced that, following a court-appointed commissioner’s recommendation, its remaining three lenders have agreed in principle to a 60-day extension to complete the remaining obligations under its NCLT-approved Scheme of Arrangement. The company has already made substantial payments and demonstrated the availability of funds for the settlement. It remains committed to fully implementing the scheme and will update stock exchanges on further developments.

headline: Updates
summary: McNally Bharat Engineering Company announced that the NCLT has dismissed its application under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, directing the company to immediately comply with Clause 5.5.2.2 of its Resolution Plan. The tribunal also ordered the respondent banks to remove the company’s NPA status and provide a No Objection Certificate within one week. The company has applied for a certified copy of the order.

headline: Updates
summary: Master Components Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, has dispensed with the meetings of equity shareholders and unsecured creditors of Master Moulds Private Limited, as well as secured creditors of Master Components, as part of the Scheme of Amalgamation between the two companies. The NCLT has directed that notices be served to regulatory authorities and published in newspapers, with the scheme still subject to other regulatory approvals. The company has uploaded the NCLT order and scheme details on its website for reference.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Sapphire Foods India Limited has received 'no objection' letters from NSE and BSE regarding its proposed Scheme of Arrangement with Devyani International Limited. The stock exchanges have outlined specific compliance conditions, including obtaining Competition Commission of India (CCI) approval and disclosing any ongoing enforcement actions. The scheme remains subject to final statutory, regulatory, and shareholder approvals.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Asian Energy Services Limited held a shareholder meeting on June 12, 2026, via video conferencing as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal, to vote on a proposed merger with Oilmax Energy Private Limited. The voting results, scrutinized by a Company Secretary, showed unanimous approval from all shareholder categories, with 100% of votes cast in favor and none against. The detailed voting results and the Scrutinizer’s report have been submitted to the stock exchange and posted on the company’s website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: NIIT Limited announced that it has received the certified order from the NCLT approving the scheme of amalgamation, with an appointed date of April 1, 2026. The scheme involves the merger of NIIT Institute of Finance Banking & Insurance Training Limited and RPS Consulting Private Limited into NIIT Limited. The amalgamation will become effective once the order is filed with the Registrar of Companies, Haryana.

headline: General Updates
summary: Gujarat Gas Limited has received final listing and trading approval for 6,22,71,47,19 equity shares. These shares were issued and allotted under a Scheme of Arrangement. The approval was confirmed in a filing with the stock exchange.

headline: General Updates
summary: Dhampur Bio Organics Limited has issued a general update confirming compliance with SEBI regulations. The company stated that the required disclosure under Regulation 30 was already provided in its earlier intimation dated April 20, 2026. No new information was shared in this announcement.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy Limited has informed the exchange that a meeting of its unsecured creditors, convened by the NCLT Mumbai Bench, will be held on 20th July 2026. The meeting is being held as per the directions of the tribunal.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: JSW Energy has informed the exchange that a meeting of its Unsecured Creditors, convened by the NCLT Mumbai Bench, will be held on July 20, 2026. The meeting is being held as per the Tribunal's directions.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy Limited has informed the exchange that a meeting of its equity shareholders has been convened by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, and is scheduled for 20th July 2026. The meeting is being held as per the directions of the NCLT.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: JSW Energy Limited has informed the exchange that a meeting of its equity shareholders, convened by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, will be held on July 20, 2026. The notice for this meeting has been issued following the directions of the NCLT.

headline: General Updates
summary: GE Power India Limited has informed the exchange about a NCLT-convened meeting for its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors, as directed by the Mumbai Bench. The meeting is being held pursuant to the Tribunal's orders. No further details on the agenda were provided in the announcement.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has provided additional clarifications regarding its proposed Scheme of Arrangement to separate and independently list Apollo Healthtech Limited. The promoter group has committed to waiving director nomination rights when their aggregate shareholding falls below 10%, with specific caps on nominee directors based on shareholding levels. These governance commitments will be incorporated into Apollo Healthtech’s articles of association after the scheme becomes effective.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Indo Thai Securities Limited has announced a meeting of its unsecured creditors, scheduled for July 24, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal (Indore Bench). The meeting is part of a Scheme of Arrangement involving the company and Indo Thai Financial Services Limited, along with their respective shareholders.

headline: Record Date
summary: Gujarat Gas Limited (now Gujarat Energy Limited) has fixed Thursday, 2nd July 2026, as the record date for determining shareholders eligible to receive equity shares of the resulting company, GSPL Transmission Limited, under a sanctioned scheme of arrangement. Under the share exchange ratio, shareholders will receive one fully paid-up equity share of Rs. 10 each in the resulting company for every three fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 2 each held in Gujarat Energy Limited. The new shares will be listed on BSE and NSE, subject to regulatory approvals.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Indo Thai Securities Limited has announced a shareholders' meeting scheduled for July 24, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal, Indore Bench. The meeting will address a Scheme of Arrangement between Indo Thai Securities Limited and Indo Thai Financial Services Limited, along with their respective shareholders.

headline: General Updates
summary: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation between Quality Care India Limited and Aster DM Healthcare Limited. The scheme will become effective once the certified NCLT order is filed with the Registrar of Companies, after which QCIL will be dissolved. Aster DM will inform the stock exchanges of the effective date in due course.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy has issued a newspaper notice regarding NCLT-convened meetings of its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors. These meetings will seek approval for a proposed scheme of arrangement involving the demerger of GE Power India Limited into JSW Energy. The process is being conducted under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Dollar Industries Limited has informed the stock exchange about a newspaper publication regarding meetings of equity shareholders and unsecured creditors. These meetings are being held to consider a Composite Scheme of Arrangement. The notice serves as formal communication of the scheduled meetings.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy has informed the exchange that the NCLT has convened meetings of its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors to seek approval for a proposed scheme of arrangement with GE Power India Limited. The scheme involves the demerger of GE Power India into JSW Energy under the relevant sections of the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy has informed the exchange that the NCLT has convened meetings of its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors to seek approval for a proposed scheme of arrangement with GE Power India Limited. The scheme involves the demerger of GE Power India into JSW Energy under the relevant sections of the Companies Act, 2013.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Concord Enviro Systems Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal issued further directions on June 11, 2026, regarding the company's petition for a Scheme of Arrangement under the Companies Act, 2013. The scheme involves the company and its shareholders.

headline: General Updates
summary: The Ramco Cements Limited has updated that the Transferor Company filed a second motion petition with the National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench, which was numbered on June 17, 2026. This follows the Tribunal's earlier approval of the first motion application on May 27, 2026, as previously communicated on June 1, 2026.
